jobs.name: Deployment Failure Resolver
jobs.prompt: Execute the deployment failure resolver routine by reading '/opt/data/procedures/deployment_failure_resolver_sop.md'. Monitor the health and rollout status of all workloads in your assigned namespace. If you detect any deployment in a failing, crashing, or stalled state (such as CrashLoopBackOff or ImagePullBackOff due to a wrong image version or tag), first check if there is already an open Pull Request or an existing branch addressing this deployment's failure. If a PR or branch already exists, do not create a duplicate; instead, summarize the status or update the existing PR if necessary. If no such PR or branch exists, invoke the 'gke-workload-troubleshooting' skill to diagnose the root cause and autonomously propose a correction via a draft Pull Request on GitHub. Report the PR link and analysis in the chat.
